parameters.query:
WITH profile AS (
  SELECT
    p.barberia_id,
    p.slug,
    p.enabled,
    p.qr_enabled,
    p.nombre_publico,
    COALESCE(p.logo_url, b.logo_url) AS logo_url,
    COALESCE(p.cover_url, b.cover_url) AS cover_url,
    COALESCE(p.ciudad, b.ciudad) AS ciudad,
    COALESCE(p.direccion, b.direccion) AS direccion,
    COALESCE(p.telefono, b.telefono) AS telefono,
    p.public_landing_url,
    p.reservation_url,
    p.qr_url,
    b.nombre,
    t.primary_color,
    t.secondary_color,
    t.background_color,
    t.text_color
  FROM public.barberia_public_profiles p
  LEFT JOIN barberias b ON b.id = p.barberia_id
  LEFT JOIN barberia_theme t ON t.barberia_id = p.barberia_id
  WHERE p.enabled = true
    AND (
      ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND p.slug = NULLIF($1::text, '')) OR
      ($2::integer IS NOT NULL AND p.barberia_id = $2::integer)
    )
  LIMIT 1
), fallback_profile AS (
  SELECT
    b.id AS barberia_id,
    b.slug,
    true AS enabled,
    true AS qr_enabled,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(b.nombre, ''), 'Barberia') AS nombre_publico,
    b.logo_url,
    b.cover_url,
    b.ciudad,
    b.direccion,
    b.telefono,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(b.slug, ''), '') <> ''
      THEN 'https://barberagency-barberagency.gymh5g.easypanel.host/index_unico/?slug=' || b.slug
      ELSE ''
    END AS public_landing_url,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(b.slug, ''), '') <> ''
      THEN 'https://barberagency-barberagency.gymh5g.easypanel.host/index_unico/?slug=' || b.slug || '#reservas'
      ELSE ''
    END AS reservation_url,
    ''::text AS qr_url,
    t.primary_color,
    t.secondary_color,
    t.background_color,
    t.text_color,
    b.nombre
  FROM barberias b
  LEFT JOIN barberia_theme t ON t.barberia_id = b.id
  WHERE (
    ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND b.slug = NULLIF($1::text, '')) OR
    ($2::integer IS NOT NULL AND b.id = $2::integer)
  )
  LIMIT 1
), resolved_profile AS (
  SELECT * FROM profile
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM fallback_profile
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profile)
  LIMIT 1
), servicios_json AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id_servicio', s.id,
        'nombre', s.nombre,
        'precio', s.precio,
        'duracion_min', COALESCE(s.duracion_min, 45),
        'icono', 'bi-scissors',
        'imagen_url', s.imagen_url,
        'image_url', s.imagen_url,
        'foto_url', s.imagen_url
      )
      ORDER BY s.id
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS servicios
  FROM servicios s
  WHERE s.barberia_id = (SELECT barberia_id FROM resolved_profile)
), barberos_json AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id_barbero', br.id,
        'nombre', br.nombre,
        'especialidad', 'Barbero profesional',
        'experiencia', 'Experiencia comprobada',
        'foto', COALESCE(br.foto_url, ''),
        'foto_url', COALESCE(br.foto_url, '')
      )
      ORDER BY br.id
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS barberos
  FROM barberos br
  WHERE br.barberia_id = (SELECT barberia_id FROM resolved_profile)
), horarios_json AS (
  SELECT '[]'::jsonb AS horarios
)
SELECT
  p.barberia_id,
  p.slug,
  p.nombre_publico,
  p.nombre,
  p.logo_url,
  p.cover_url,
  p.ciudad,
  p.direccion,
  p.telefono,
  p.public_landing_url,
  p.reservation_url,
  p.qr_url,
  p.primary_color,
  p.secondary_color,
  p.background_color,
  p.text_color,
  servicios_json.servicios,
  barberos_json.barberos,
  horarios_json.horarios
FROM (SELECT 1 AS keepalive) base
LEFT JOIN resolved_profile p ON true
CROSS JOIN servicios_json
CROSS JOIN barberos_json
CROSS JOIN horarios_json;

parameters.jsCode:
const row = $json && typeof $json === 'object' ? $json : {};
const clean = (v) => (v ?? '').toString().trim();
const hasProfile = Number(row.barberia_id || 0) > 0;
return [{ json: {
  ok: hasProfile,
  barberia_id: Number(row.barberia_id || 0) || null,
  slug: clean(row.slug),
  profile: hasProfile ? {
    barberia_id: Number(row.barberia_id || 0) || null,
    slug: clean(row.slug),
    nombre_publico: clean(row.nombre_publico),
    nombre: clean(row.nombre),
    logo_url: clean(row.logo_url),
    cover_url: clean(row.cover_url),
    ciudad: clean(row.ciudad),
    direccion: clean(row.direccion),
    telefono: clean(row.telefono),
    public_landing_url: clean(row.public_landing_url),
    reservation_url: clean(row.reservation_url),
    qr_url: clean(row.qr_url)
  } : null,
  branding: hasProfile ? {
    logo_url: clean(row.logo_url),
    cover_url: clean(row.cover_url),
    hero_image_url: clean(row.cover_url),
    color_primary: clean(row.primary_color),
    color_secondary: clean(row.secondary_color),
    color_background: clean(row.background_color),
    color_text: clean(row.text_color),
    palette_primary: clean(row.primary_color),
    palette_secondary: clean(row.secondary_color),
    palette_text: clean(row.text_color),
    use_custom_palette: true
  } : null,
  servicios: Array.isArray(row.servicios) ? row.servicios : [],
  barberos: Array.isArray(row.barberos) ? row.barberos : [],
  horarios: Array.isArray(row.horarios) ? row.horarios : [],
  slot_min: 30,
  public_landing_url: clean(row.public_landing_url),
  reservation_url: clean(row.reservation_url),
  qr_url: clean(row.qr_url)
} }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: $json.ok ?? false, barberia_id: $json.barberia_id ?? null, slug: $json.slug ?? "", profile: $json.profile ?? null, branding: $json.branding ?? null, servicios: Array.isArray($json.servicios) ? $json.servicios : [], barberos: Array.isArray($json.barberos) ? $json.barberos : [], horarios: Array.isArray($json.horarios) ? $json.horarios : [], slot_min: $json.slot_min ?? 30, public_landing_url: $json.public_landing_url ?? "", reservation_url: $json.reservation_url ?? "", qr_url: $json.qr_url ?? "" } }}

parameters.query:
WITH profile AS (
  SELECT
    p.barberia_id,
    p.slug,
    p.enabled,
    p.qr_enabled,
    p.nombre_publico,
    COALESCE(p.logo_url, b.logo_url) AS logo_url,

    p.public_landing_url,
    p.reservation_url,

    b.nombre,
    t.primary_color,
    t.secondary_color,
    t.background_color,

  FROM public.barberia_public_profiles p
  LEFT JOIN barberias b ON b.id = p.barberia_id

  WHERE p.enabled = true
    AND (

    b.slug,
    true AS enabled,
    true AS qr_enabled,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(b.nombre, ''), 'Barberia') AS nombre_publico,
    b.logo_url,
    b.cover_url,

      ELSE ''

    ''::text AS qr_url,
    t.primary_color,

    t.text_color,
    b.nombre
  FROM barberias b
  LEFT JOIN barberia_theme t ON t.barberia_id = b.id
  WHERE (
    ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND b.slug = NULLIF($1::text, '')) OR
    ($2::integer IS NOT NULL AND b.id = $2::integer)

  LIMIT 1

  SELECT * FROM fallback_profile
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profile)

), servicios_json AS (

        'foto_url', COALESCE(br.foto_url, '')

  FROM barberos br
  WHERE br.barberia_id = (SELECT barberia_id FROM resolved_profile)
), horarios_json AS (
  SELECT '[]'::jsonb AS horarios

SELECT
  p.barberia_id,
  p.slug,
  p.nombre_publico,
  p.nombre,
  p.logo_url,

  p.ciudad,
  p.direccion,
  p.telefono,
  p.public_landing_url,
  p.reservation_url,
  p.qr_url,
  p.primary_color,

const clean = (v) => (v ?? '').toString().trim();
